  • Surf Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     2 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) (Sasha Bertasius) "Wonderful views of continuing male birds seen in a Velvet scoter flock, viewed from the part of the sea wall that's near the Old scrapes."
  • Surf Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     2 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) (Sam Shutt) "Known males associating with a flock of Velvet and Common Scoter off the old scrapes. Flew in very close at one point. Photographed."

  • Cetti's Warbler
    More info
    eBird
     1 Scoughall (David Kelly) "Known bird. Calling occasionally. Seen briefly, once in the gorse and once crossing the river. Warbler with long broad tail , reddish-brown upperparts and grey underparts. Will try to upload recording."
